title: GPT-5.6 Sol Ultra produces proof of the Cycle Double Cover Conjecture [pdf]
summary: OpenAI的GPT-5.6 Sol Ultra模型成功证明了图论中的Cycle Double Cover猜想。
translated_summary: OpenAI's GPT-5.6 Sol Ultra model has produced a proof of the Cycle Double Cover Conjecture in graph theory, marking a significant milestone in AI-assisted mathematical research.
